title: tephrosia varians
intro: Tephrosia varians, also known as Horsefly Tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and brown pods. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia varians include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia varians include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
